parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id AS tenant_id,
  t.slug,
  t.nome_empresa,
  wi.id AS instance_id,
  wi.instance_token,
  wi.uazapi_url,
  wi.instance_name,
  ac.agent_name,
  ac.business_description,
  ac.communication_style,
  ac.personality,
  ac.extra_rules,
  ac.handoff_phone,
  ac.handoff_message
FROM lia_whatsapp_instances wi
JOIN lia_tenants t ON wi.tenant_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN lia_agent_configs ac ON t.id = ac.tenant_id
WHERE wi.instance_token = $1
  AND wi.status = 'connected'
  AND t.is_active = true
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO lia_contacts (tenant_id, phone, name, source_channel)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, NULLIF($3, ''), 'whatsapp')
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, phone) DO UPDATE
  SET last_seen_at = NOW(),
      name = COALESCE(lia_contacts.name, EXCLUDED.name)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO lia_conversations (tenant_id, contact_id, channel, session_id)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, 'whatsapp', $3)
ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE
  SET last_message_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

SELECT id, keyword, match_mode, message_text, asset_type, asset_url, cta_link
FROM lia_campaigns
WHERE tenant_id = $1::uuid
  AND active = true
  AND (starts_at IS NULL OR starts_at <= NOW())
  AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at >= NOW());

WITH lead_insert AS (
  INSERT INTO lia_leads (tenant_id, contact_id, campaign_id, stage, metadata)
  VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, 'captured', jsonb_build_object('channel','whatsapp'))
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO lia_messages (conversation_id, direction, sender_type, content_type, content)
VALUES ($4::uuid, 'outbound', 'agent', 'text', $5)
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Pg — Instance lookup').item.json.tenant_id }},{{ $('Pg — Upsert contact').item.json.id }},{{ $('Match campaign').item.json.matchedCampaign.id }},{{ $('Pg — Upsert conversation').item.json.id }},{{ '🤖 ' + ($('Match campaign').item.json.matchedCampaign.message_text || '(asset enviado)') }}

parameters.query:
SELECT external_msg_id, created_at
FROM lia_messages
WHERE conversation_id = $1::uuid
  AND direction = 'inbound'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT content, created_at
FROM lia_messages
WHERE conversation_id = $1::uuid
  AND direction = 'inbound'
  AND created_at > COALESCE(
    (SELECT created_at FROM lia_messages
     WHERE conversation_id = $1::uuid AND direction = 'outbound'
     ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
    TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01'
  )
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

parameters.name: search_knowledge
parameters.description: Busca informações na base de conhecimento do negócio (produtos, preços, procedimentos, FAQs). Use SEMPRE que a pergunta for factual sobre o cliente. Parâmetro: query (pergunta do usuário em pt-br).

value.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Pergunta do usuário em pt-br sobre o negócio', 'string') }}

parameters.name: send_whatsapp_invite
parameters.description: Gera um link wa.me para transferir o lead para um NÚMERO DIFERENTE (atendimento humano). Só use se o lead pediu atendimento humano e handoff estiver configurado. NÃO use para convidar para o próprio WhatsApp — o lead já está aqui.
